creator: makripodis@techgr.net
text:
Created attachment 193562
ktrace.out while the app crash appearing

Hi all

I am running skype4 on freebsd/current and I have no managed to have skype4 in working state. 
The app starts, prompts for the credentials screen and then dies without any reason.
This behavior it is constant, it didn't worked a single time. It dies whenever you put a correct or wrong set of username/password.


How to reproduce:
-------------------
1/ Install skype4 from ports
2/ Execute skype from xterm or through windows manager shortcut
3/ The credentials screen appears; I fill the "Skype name" and my password and hit the "sign in" button;  then skype diplays the "signing in" message and then dies without any trace ( messages, logs, core files, etc)


Debug info:
-----------------
Generated a ktrace dump (ktrace.out.gz) which covers the the skype app runnning on the credentials screen, hitting the "sign in" button and the crash that follows.


Environment details and versions:
------------------------------------
➜  ~ uname -a; sysctl compat.linux | head -2; grep OVERRIDE_LINUX_ /etc/make.conf
FreeBSD perseus 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #3 r333874: Sun May 20 23:21:32 EEST 2018     root@perseus:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/THINKPAD  amd64
compat.linux.oss_version: 198144
compat.linux.osrelease: 2.6.32

➜  ~ sysctl -n kern.securelevel
-1

CPUTYPE?=native
#CPUTYPE?=westmere
CFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing
COPTFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing
MALLOC_PRODUCTION="YES"
ACPI_DEBUG=1
PORTS_MODULES+=emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod sysutils/lsof x11/nvidia-driver-340
MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=4

WITHOUT_ASSERT_DEBUG="ON"
